acceptance.proof: Each runtime facade admits only its matching opaque module capability and rejects a wrong module typed before effects.
Handshake-to-sample, sample-to-queue/clock, and queue-to-recovery dependencies are required as opaque activation composition.
Accepted bounded runtime behavior remains passing and no feature activates without explicit exact-lock admission and facade construction.
No breadth, dependency, device, private publication, ambient effect, or Manifold authority is added.

commit_policy: Commit proposal, lifecycle, one coherent activation-composition family, resolver-owned lock refresh, validation, acceptance, and push preparation intentionally; preserve failures.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route mandatory module/dependency capability composition and nonclaims.
Describe dependency-closed activation across preserved runtime facades.
Record enforced dependency direction and capability consumption.
Route composition parity and damaged capability checks.
Review feature-lock refresh and dependency closure; current guidance covers both.
Review opaque dependency capability composition; current guidance covers it.

non_scope: Runtime transport behavior changes, shared transport extraction, String, Int64, chunks, multi-channel, broader discovery, adapters, or crate splitting.
Devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, official implementation source, private evidence, ambient activation, or Manifold authority.
objective: Enforce the accepted feature-lock dependency graph through opaque LSLC-003C module capabilities across the existing handshake, Float32/fixed-width sample, queue, recovery, integrated-clock, and discovery activation facades, preserving each runtime effect and bound unchanged.
outputs: Every existing runtime activation facade requires its matching opaque LSLC-003C capability; dependency-bearing facades additionally consume the exact prerequisite activation capability declared by the lock.
The resolved feature lock is refreshed only through the owner resolver for changed source provenance, and LSLC-003C exact-lock binding follows the new accepted fingerprint.
Focused valid/damaged composition tests and source/public/workflow validation prove wrong-module and missing dependency paths cannot activate effects.
